title: TrustForge ProofRPC Service Descriptor
description: Declarative RPC service definition consumed by tf-schema codegen --target rpc-ts|rpc-rust. See TF-0007.

rpc_version.description: Version of the proofrpc service descriptor schema.

service_id.description: PascalCase service identifier used by generated client and server types.

name.description: Method name, camelCase or snake_case, starts with a lowercase letter.

kind.description: Streaming mode. Unary is one request, one response. Server-streaming is one request, zero or more responses.

request.description: Inline JSON Schema describing the request body. Must be type:object with properties.

response.description: Inline JSON Schema describing the response body (or stream element for server-streaming).

capability.description: Name of the TrustForge capability required to invoke.

risk.description: Risk class assigned to this method.

proof.description: Proof level at which successful calls are emitted.

approval.description: Approval requirement for invocations; defaults to none.
